title: Add Controller Support and Input Mode Manager

deltas.description: Add requirement: The system SHALL maintain a global input mode that determines which commands are valid and how UI focus is managed.

requirement.text: The system SHALL maintain a global input mode that determines which commands are valid and how UI focus is managed.

scenarios.rawText:
- **GIVEN** a menu is open
- **WHEN** the Input Mode is set to `MENU`
- **THEN** D-pad and Left Stick inputs SHALL navigate UI focus instead of map cursor.

requirements.text: The system SHALL maintain a global input mode that determines which commands are valid and how UI focus is managed.

scenarios.rawText:
- **GIVEN** a menu is open
- **WHEN** the Input Mode is set to `MENU`
- **THEN** D-pad and Left Stick inputs SHALL navigate UI focus instead of map cursor.

deltas.description: Add requirement: The system SHALL provide default controller bindings for all core gameplay actions.

requirement.text: The system SHALL provide default controller bindings for all core gameplay actions.

scenarios.rawText:
- **WHEN** the Left or Right Trigger is pressed
- **THEN** the camera SHALL rotate left or right respectively.

- **WHEN** the Left or Right Bumper is pressed
- **THEN** the active unit selection SHALL cycle to the previous or next unit.

requirements.text: The system SHALL provide default controller bindings for all core gameplay actions.
